contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: dao_protocol PR6b: order-sync audit-log delegation endpoint (/stripe/order_sync) + roadmap drift audit
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/40
  
  Details:
  PR6b (scoped per operator decision A): ported the non-deprecated Tenant B core of the Stripe cluster. sheets/stripe_checkout_log.py ports Gdrive::StripeCheckoutLog (append cols A-I + out-of-band fee col L / environment col Q so the GAS-owned cols J-P stay intact; dedup on col C; agroverse_qr_code key). order_sync.py ports the MetaCheckoutOrderSync ledger-tagged path (classify session, dedup, append); the channel==meta Wix order-creation path stays on Rails (deprecated). routes/stripe_order_sync.py exposes POST /stripe/order_sync as the delegation target Rails' shared /stripe_webhook calls for checkout.session.completed (the webhook entry stays on Rails, shared with trading-SaaS subscriptions). 6 tests (43 total). Deployed to seni_ror_new:8010 and verified the route mounted; gate off. Also ran a roadmap drift audit: deployed PR6b (it had merged but not been deployed), reconciled the execution roadmap tracker to reality, and added a consolidated Outstanding section.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
